global_instructions: Improve overall colors, header, and professional feel without altering the layout. Keep the navy and gold brand identity but elevate it with gradients, soft glows, and warmer neutrals to make it feel more approachable yet authoritative.

typography.headings: Playfair Display, serif (add `tracking-tight` for large headings)

component_instructions.Global_Background: Replace `bg-[#F8F9FA]` with `bg-[#FAF9F6]` across AnalysisDashboard.jsx and other main wrapper divs to introduce color warmth.
component_instructions.Navbar: Refine the glassmorphism in `Navbar.jsx`: use `bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-slate-200/60 shadow-sm`. Update the active nav link to have a slightly bolder gold border and maybe a subtle text color shift.
component_instructions.AnalysisDashboard_Header: In `AnalysisDashboard.jsx`, replace the flat `bg-[#0B192C]` with a rich gradient: `bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0A1428] via-[#0B192C] to-[#11233D] relative overflow-hidden`. Add an absolute positioned div (`bg-[#C5A059]/10 blur-[100px] w-96 h-96 rounded-full top-0 right-0 pointer-events-none`) to create a subtle warm inner glow. Ensure the content wrapper has `relative z-10`.
component_instructions.StageStepper: Enhance the `StageStep` in `AnalysisDashboard.jsx`. Active state: `border-[#C5A059] bg-[#C5A059]/10 text-[#C5A059] shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(197,160,89,0.3)]`. Complete state: `bg-emerald-500/15 border-emerald-500/50 text-emerald-400`. Inactive state: `border-white/10 text-white/30`. Update `StageConnector` similarly.
component_instructions.StatusBadges: Soften the status badges in the header. Use `bg-[#C5A059]/10 border-[#C5A059]/20 text-[#C5A059]` instead of harsher opacities. Ensure the text is slightly bolder.
component_instructions.Tabs: In `TabsList` and `TabsTrigger`, add a subtle background tint for the active tab (e.g., `data-[state=active]:bg-[#FAF9F6]`) and keep the gold border but make it more pronounced. Inactive tabs should be `text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700`.
component_instructions.CouncilCards: In `CouncilCard.jsx`, soften the border to `border-slate-200/60` and add a subtle ambient shadow `shadow-[0_4px_24px_-8px_rgba(11,25,44,0.06)]` or similar. The top colored accent bar can remain but consider `h-1.5` instead of `h-1` to make it a bit more deliberate.
component_instructions.ChiefJusticeCard: In `ChiefJusticeCard.jsx`, replace `bg-[#0B192C]` with `bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0B192C] to-[#12223A] border border-[#C5A059]/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_-8px_rgba(11,25,44,0.15)] relative overflow-hidden`. The synthesis text can be `text-slate-200` to be slightly warmer than plain white/gray.
